entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00090) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION DELETES THE CONTRACTUAL REQUIREMENT FOR AN EARNED VALUE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM (EVMS) EFFECTIVE FOR THE MAY 2014 SUBMISSION. IN EXCHANGE FOR THIS REDUCTION IN SCOPE FOR THE MAY 2014 THROUGH JANUARY 2015 EVMS SUBMISSION, THE PARTIES AGREE TO CONSIDERATION IN THE AMOUNT OF AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS OFFICE SPACE IN THE CONTRACTING PROJECT RESIDENT OFFICE (PRO) AT THE MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION FACILITY.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00091) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION FULLY DEFINITIZES COSTS AND CREDITS AND ESTABLISHES PRICING FOR ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL (ECP) ECP-3046, BOAT CREW HELMET OBSOLESCENCE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00092) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NOTE: THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF THIS MODIFICATION: $1,056,643,566 STATED WITHIN CIMS IS INFLATED DUE TO THE VARIOUS ORDERING SCENARIOS OF HULLS DURING THIS ORDERING PERIOD UNDER THIS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT. THIS MODIFICATION EXTENDS THE CONTRACT ORDERING PERIOD BY ONE YEAR AS AUTHORIZED BY THE HEAD OF CONTRACTING ACTIVITY (HCA) APPROVAL DATED 17 APRIL 2014. PRICE PERIOD 9 IS INCORPORATED FOR THE PERIOD 21 JUNE 2014 THROUGH 20 JUNE 2015.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00093) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES A QUANTITY OF 8 FURUNO REMOTE DISPLAYS&4 FORWARD WEAPONS MOUNTS AS GFP. ALSO, REMOVES CREDITS FOR WINTER TESTING WAIVERS OF HULLS 45752&45754 AT $1,000 PER HULL.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00094) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION DELETES THE SPECIFIED REQUIREMENT FOR AURAGEN VIPER POWER GENERATING SYSTEM AND AUTHORIZES THE CONTRACTOR TO INCORPORATE THEIR ALTERNATIVE POWER GENERATING SYSTEM.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE HARDWARE COMPONENTS PURCHASED UNDER DO HSCG23-14-J-ARP457 FOR THE IETM/ISM STAND ALONE WORKING COPY AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY FOR FINAL DELIVERY OF THE IETM/ISM/IETP ONTO A GOVERNMENT SYSTEM.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
